label: Subagent • residency direction: remote→local runs in place
query: A remote orchestrator spawns a local model.
notes: LIVE RESIDENCY (machine-specific). PRODUCTION path: the orchestrator is REMOTE (ensureResident=false → no local chat model resident), then spawns a LOCAL target. A remote orchestrator has no resident local model to evict, so SubagentResidency runs the local target in place → handoffWrapped=false. Needs NO remote key (the remote orchestrator is never run — only the local target generates); SKIPS (unavailable) when the local target isn't installed. Id is `residency-dir-*` so it stays OUT of FILTER=spawn; run with FILTER=residency-dir-.

subagent.input: Reply with a single short sentence confirming you received this task.
